title: About - Mary Glindon MP - Mary Glindon
meta_description: Member of Parliament for Newcastle Upon Tyne East and Wallsend
text_excerpt: About - Mary Glindon MP - Mary Glindon Skip to main content Mary Glindon Member of Parliament for Newcastle Upon Tyne East and Wallsend About Privacy Policy Contact Policy My work in Parliament More Menu About Mary was first elected as the Member of Parliament for North Tyneside at the 2010 General Election, at the 2024 general election Mary was elected as the Member of Parliament for Newcastle Upon Tyne East and Wallsend. Mary’s husband Ray sadly passed away in 2020, Mary is a loving mother and grandmother. Before serving as an MP Mary was a Councillor in the Battle Hill ward on North Tyneside Council. In Parliament Mary has served as a Shadow Minister and as a member of the Whips team. Mary has sat on many Parliamentary committees and chairs a number of All Party Parliamentary groups. Mary Glindon Further details Promoted by Eddie Darke on behalf of Mary Glindon, both at Ruby Court, 1a Wesley Way, Newcastle, NE12 9UP You can view my privacy policy here https://maryglindon.com/privacy-policy/ ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
